raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Reporting a deliberate act of surrender to a higher power as one stage in a structured recovery program",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "A God/higher power exists and is capable of providing care",
    "An individual can transfer control of their will and life to that higher power",
    "Personal understanding of God is valid and sufficient for the transfer",
    "Such surrender is a meaningful and beneficial step toward recovery"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent within a spiritual-recovery framework; the qualifier 'as we understood Him' reduces dogmatism while presupposing a theistic or higher-power ontology",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The recipient accepts a higher-power concept, finds value in relinquishing self-will, and pairs the step with practical action rather than passivity",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statement is treated as the sole or sufficient solution, discourages personal agency or evidence-based treatment, or is used to justify inaction or external blame"
}
